events.label: assistant
events.text: Assessment written to `/app/answer.json`. Bottom line: a bare P0420 with one freeze frame doesn't justify a catalyst replacement — decision is `needs_more_info`, medium risk. Before ordering the converter, the shop needs O2 sensor waveform comparison (upstream/downstream), fuel trim data, an exhaust leak inspection, and a check for contributing misfire/oil/coolant issues, since all of these can trigger P0420 without the catalyst itself being at fault.
